memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &key, const std::string &displayName, const std::string &uniformName, float value, const std::string &mirrorUniformName="")

parameterdescription.para: Name used for mirror uniform name.

briefdescription.para: Marks material fields dirty for reapply.
